name: jonas_bike_theft
description: Bicycle theft outside a Späti in Neukölln.  Lock was U-lock — covered.  Member is upset, blaming himself.  Tests: empathy first ('not on you'), CRM-aware response (we already see his Canyon Endurace registered with serial number), correct extraction of items_stolen and police_case_number.
caller_turns: Hi, I — I just had my bike stolen.  This is so stupid, I literally only locked it up for ten minutes.
It was outside the Späti on Hermannplatz, about an hour ago — like, six-thirty pm.
It's the Canyon I have on the policy — the Endurace.  I had a U-lock on it through the frame and back wheel, but they cut it.
I called 110, the officer came out, he gave me a case number — let me find it — VKB-2026-04-25-Berlin-7711.
I have the original receipt and photos of the bike from when I bought it.  And I think I know the serial too.
No one was hurt, no.  Just me, kicking myself.
